info.description: API for managing users, authentication, and clinic operations.
info.title: Dental Clinic API

get.description: Returns a list of all addresss
Returns a single address by its UUID
Returns a single appointment by UUID

put.description: Updates an existing appointment by UUID

get.description: Returns a list of all clinics
Returns all services for a specific clinic
Returns a single clinic by its UUID

put.description: Updates an existing clinic by UUID

get.description: Returns a list of all clinic address
Returns a list of all doctors

post.description: Creates a new doctor profile linked to a user

get.description: Returns a single doctor by ID
Returns a list of all dental services

post.description: Creates a new dental service (e.g. teeth cleaning, tooth extraction)

get.description: Returns a single service by ID
Returns a list of all users
